message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This page from a Mitsubishi Heavy Industries high-temperature water source heat pump manual describes basic operation procedures for starting and stopping the unit. It details three control methods (remote control, local control panel, and remote external signal) and their operational hierarchies, noting that the control panel's stop button is always active regardless of the selected mode. It also references a diagram (Fig 9-6) for remote start/stop signal connections.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "header", "label": "Mitsubishi Heavy Industries High-Temperature Water Source Heat Pump"},
    {"type": "section_heading", "label": "9.4 Basic Operation"},
    {"type": "subsection_heading", "label": "9.4.1 Start/Stop"},
    {"type": "icon", "label": "Control panel icon"},
    {"type": "sidebar_text", "label": "9 Control Cabinet Structure"},
    {"type": "footer", "label": "Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Centrifugal High-Temperature Water Source Heat Pump ETW Technical Data 33"},
    {"type": "watermark", "label": "Refrigeration Hundred Network: www.zhilingbj.cn"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["operational_procedures", "control_logic", "system_interface"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "进行热泵运转与停止的起停操作可利用①遥控器、②就地（控制柜正面的按钮）与③远程（外部信号）的方式进行。利用控制柜上的切换开关选择起停操作位置。\n(1) 起停操作位置的比较\n① 起停操作位置为“遥控器”时\n可利用遥控器的运转与停止按钮进行热泵的运转与停止，但不能利用“就地”、“远程”运转指令以及“远程”停止指令进行起停。\n② 起停操作位置为“就地”时\n可利用控制柜的运转与停止按钮进行热泵的运转与停止，但不能利用“遥控器”、“远程”运转指令与停止指令进行起停。\n③ 起停操作位置为“远程”时\n可利用远程运转与停止指令进行热泵的运转与停止。不能利用“就地”、“远程”运转指令以及“遥控器”停止指令进行起停。\n不论在哪种情况下，控制柜的停止按钮始终有效，而与起停操作位置无关。\n(2) 远程起停信号的连接\n图 9-6 所示为远程起停信号的连接方法（有/无电压脉冲接点、有/无电压连续接点）。",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page references 'Fig 9-6' for remote signal connection details, but the figure itself is not visible on this page. The operational logic is described textually.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This page from a Mitsubishi Heavy Industries high-temperature water source heat pump manual describes basic operation procedures for starting and stopping the unit. It details three control methods (remote control, local control panel, and remote external signal) and their operational hierarchies, noting that the control panel's stop button is always active regardless of the selected mode. It also references a diagram (Fig 9-6) for remote start/stop signal connections.

visual_entities.label: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries High-Temperature Water Source Heat Pump
Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Centrifugal High-Temperature Water Source Heat Pump ETW Technical Data 33

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
进行热泵运转与停止的起停操作可利用①遥控器、②就地（控制柜正面的按钮）与③远程（外部信号）的方式进行。利用控制柜上的切换开关选择起停操作位置。
(1) 起停操作位置的比较
① 起停操作位置为“遥控器”时
可利用遥控器的运转与停止按钮进行热泵的运转与停止，但不能利用“就地”、“远程”运转指令以及“远程”停止指令进行起停。
② 起停操作位置为“就地”时
可利用控制柜的运转与停止按钮进行热泵的运转与停止，但不能利用“遥控器”、“远程”运转指令与停止指令进行起停。
③ 起停操作位置为“远程”时
可利用远程运转与停止指令进行热泵的运转与停止。不能利用“就地”、“远程”运转指令以及“遥控器”停止指令进行起停。
不论在哪种情况下，控制柜的停止按钮始终有效，而与起停操作位置无关。
(2) 远程起停信号的连接
图 9-6 所示为远程起停信号的连接方法（有/无电压脉冲接点、有/无电压连续接点）。
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page references 'Fig 9-6' for remote signal connection details, but the figure itself is not visible on this page. The operational logic is described textually.
